Dosecolor Backend
  • Module code
  • src.utils.security

Source code for src.utils.security

from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone

import bcrypt
from jose import JWTError, jwt

from src.config import settings


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Password hashing
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------



[docs]
def hash_password(plain: str) -> str:
    """Hash a password using bcrypt."""
    salt = bcrypt.gensalt()
    return bcrypt.hashpw(plain.encode("utf-8"), salt).decode("utf-8")






[docs]
def verify_password(plain: str, hashed: str) -> bool:
    """Verify a password against a bcrypt hash."""
    return bcrypt.checkpw(plain.encode("utf-8"), hashed.encode("utf-8"))




# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# JWT tokens
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------



[docs]
def create_access_token(data: dict, expires_delta: timedelta | None = None) -> str:
    to_encode = data.copy()
    expire = datetime.now(timezone.utc) + (
        expires_delta or timedelta(minutes=settings.ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES)
    )
    to_encode.update({"exp": expire, "type": "access"})
    return jwt.encode(to_encode, settings.SECRET_KEY, algorithm=settings.ALGORITHM)






[docs]
def create_refresh_token(data: dict) -> str:
    """Create a refresh token with longer expiration."""
    to_encode = data.copy()
    expire = datetime.now(timezone.utc) + timedelta(days=settings.REFRESH_TOKEN_EXPIRE_DAYS)
    to_encode.update({"exp": expire, "type": "refresh"})
    return jwt.encode(to_encode, settings.SECRET_KEY, algorithm=settings.ALGORITHM)






[docs]
def decode_access_token(token: str) -> dict | None:
    """Return the payload dict or None if the token is invalid/expired."""
    try:
        payload = jwt.decode(token, settings.SECRET_KEY, algorithms=[settings.ALGORITHM])
        if payload.get("type") != "access":
            return None
        return payload
    except JWTError:
        return None






[docs]
def decode_refresh_token(token: str) -> dict | None:
    """Return the payload dict or None if the refresh token is invalid/expired."""
    try:
        payload = jwt.decode(token, settings.SECRET_KEY, algorithms=[settings.ALGORITHM])
        if payload.get("type") != "refresh":
            return None
        return payload
    except JWTError:
        return None




# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Google OAuth CSRF state (signed JWT, ~10 minutes)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

GOOGLE_OAUTH_STATE_MINUTES = 10




[docs]
def create_google_oauth_state_jwt() -> str:
    """Signed state token for Google OAuth authorize redirect (CSRF protection)."""
    expire = datetime.now(timezone.utc) + timedelta(minutes=GOOGLE_OAUTH_STATE_MINUTES)
    payload = {"exp": expire, "typ": "google_oauth"}
    return jwt.encode(payload, settings.SECRET_KEY, algorithm=settings.ALGORITHM)






[docs]
def decode_google_oauth_state_jwt(token: str) -> dict | None:
    """Verify Google OAuth state JWT; require typ === google_oauth."""
    try:
        payload = jwt.decode(token, settings.SECRET_KEY, algorithms=[settings.ALGORITHM])
        if payload.get("typ") != "google_oauth":
            return None
        return payload
    except JWTError:
        return None
